== Notes for [[Item:Q57772|Q57772]] ==

Moved to Puerto Rico in 1577 as a "criado" of his 2nd cousin fray Diego de Salamanca Polanco, Bishop of San Juan de Puerto Rico. Died without succession in the Duchy of Normandy (France)

http://www.archivesportaleurope.net/ead-display/-/ead/pl/aicode/ES-41091-AGI10/type/fa/id/ES-AGI-41091-UD-1859528/unitid/ES-AGI-41091-UD-1859528+-+ES-AGI-41091-UD-133496/search/0/polanco+puerto+rico

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051ADBAE6A21EFBBFA9822EF79916C5D4A
geni:6000000076338426893

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
